identityRules.face: entire face, muzzle, and chin surface remain black
identityRules.throat: white spreads behind and beneath the black chin across the front underside only; it never wraps into a collar
identityRules.body: lean adult build with the real irregular white chest and belly
identityRules.forelegs: long white stripe only on Ajman's anatomical left foreleg; right foreleg is black except for white paw/toes
identityRules.ear: one modest clean flat TNR tip on Ajman's left ear
